/ucrt64/bin/c++.exe -Wl,--enable-auto-import "CMakeFiles/optifi-core-engine.dir/common/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/optifi-core-engine.dir/common/src/PacketProcessor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/optifi-core-engine.dir/common/src/Profiler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/optifi-core-engine.dir/common/src/UsbHardware.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/optifi-core-engine.dir/platform/windows/src/PlatformWindows.cpp.o" -o optifi-core-engine.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liboptifi-core-engine.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0  -lusb-1.0 -lws2_32
